history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person wearing an orange sleeveless top and a black cap faces the camera while large outlined text overlays the lower portion of the image.

Main Subject:
A single person is centered in the frame, shown from about the chest up. They wear a black baseball cap with a white emblem on the front and an orange sleeveless garment. The person has short facial hair and a neutral expression, with their head slightly tilted. Small circular earrings are visible.

Setting:
The background is a plain light-colored indoor wall. Behind the person to the right, there is a wall-mounted object that appears like a clock with a dark face and light hands.

Visual Details:
Lighting is soft and even, with a slight warm tone. The cap is dark, and the emblem is white. The orange sleeveless top stands out strongly against the light wall. A round clock-like face is visible on the right side of the background. The text overlay is large, bold, and white with a black outline, arranged in two lines across the lower left and center: “AYO KITA” on the first line and “MABAR” on the second line.

Visible Text:
AYO KITA
MABAR

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person in an orange sleeveless top and a black cap standing in front of a light wall with a clock-like object in the background. Large bold text overlays the lower part of the image.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
